paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently at 5.93, with a change of -5.12% from the prior close and -31.52% over the last 20 sessions. The price quote is as of July 16, 2026.

Recent news headlines from Yahoo Finance and Stocktwits discuss the company's governance and valuation, with some articles questioning whether the stock is above fair value and others addressing governance tensions. A convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson are also mentioned in the news.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records.
